text: Testing plays a crucial role in software development. Unit tests check individual components, ensuring each piece works correctly on its own. Integration tests verify that different parts of the system interact well together, catching issues between modules. Many developers use test-driven development, where they write tests before the actual code. This approach forces clear thinking about desired outcomes from the start. Together, these practices build confidence. When you have a solid test suite, you can make changes or add features without fear of breaking existing functionality. The tests act as a safety net, allowing teams to move faster and release more reliable software.
